## Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the requested feature or improvement.

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe it clearly.
Example: "I always struggle when..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you envision this working or what interface changes would be needed.

## Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context

Add any mockups, screenshots, or context here.
